title: Complex Hex
description: An addon for Hexcasting with whatever I feel like
body:
An addon for Hexcasting with whatever I feel like
# Maths
## -> Complex Numbers
Most normal maths operations work, as well as conjugations and complex multiplication. \
Pretty useless, unless you feel like doing rotations in one of the normal 3 planes lmao \
![A Complex Number Iota in the Stack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62cca40f9416b19b58c401a17496bf276c256443.png)

## -> Quaternions
Again, most normal maths operations work, as well as inverses, and hamilton multiplication. \
Basically everything you need to do 3D rotations with them! \
(also you can turn them into MoreIotas Matrices which reperesent equivalent rotations (and vice versa) ) \
![A Quaternion iota in the Stack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c1858d57a122b9d3338b8e94f51a303b91c7a56.png)

# BIT Manipulation
Adds patterns to manipulate Block, Item, or Text Displays (BITs for short) \
A spawn pattern for each, and a pattern for translation, rotation, and scaling and one to kill it as well as the associated patterns for entity purification/zone distillation \
![A glazed magenta terracotta blockdisplay in the world, and at an odd angle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2972cc864629d72d83c99022d8cf2677c456a1.png)

# Bubbles
A way to put an iota in a bubble (an iota on the stack itself), which when executed via Hermes' or the likes will push its contained iota to the stack. \
![A bubble Iota in the stack containing "Bubbles!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c34e733028880db3d8d1363398d67cb9e681682.png)
